name: Carrot and Raisin Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp salt (or sugar substitute equivalent to 6 ts sugar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except lettuce in a large bowl.
2. Cover the bowl and chill for at least 2 hours before serving.
3. Serve on crisp lettuce leaves.
Food Exchange per Serving: 2 VEGETABLE EXCHANGES; CAL: 47; CHO: 9g; PRO: 1g; SOD: 153mg; CHO: 10mg
Low-sodium diets: Omit salt and prepare the low-calorie dressing without salt.
